prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1JZ-GTE VVT-i (2.5L inline-6) with a Garrett GT35R turbo (68mm compressor, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 264°/264° camshaft set for high-RPM power, paired with a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x100mm core) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R with a 70mm titanium tip

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a Tomei M72 stud kit for the 1JZ-GTE, ARP main studs, and a custom 80mm throttle body by HKS, mated to a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a pre-loaded 1JZ-GTE VVT-i base map optimized for E85 fuel (via a Fuelab 450 LPH fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Brevis' 1,450kg weight), Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, and a full polybush kit by Whiteline (including subframe bushings and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity, complemented by a KAAZ 1.5-way mechanical LSD (25-spline, 4.625 final drive ratio)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (front bumper, side skirts, rear bumper, and overfenders) in raw carbon fiber, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear wing (3-piece, adjustable) and a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and pillars

OEM+ JDM-spec lighting upgrade with Koito Bi-Xenon projectors (HID, 4300K) in the stock headlight housings, retrofitted with Morimoto D2S HID bulbs and a custom LED halo kit by VLED, alongside a full LED taillight conversion by Jun Auto (clear lenses with smoked reflectors)

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) in black Alcantara with red stitching, a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (perforated leather, 6-bolt hub), and a full custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel) with a bolt-in harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses
